summary: Mobile PWA Phase 5 testing completed successfully. All mobile portfolio browsing features verified including search, filters, portfolio cards with banners, risk badges, calculator with expected profit, and fixed bottom CTA. Desktop versions also working correctly.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps with navigation items - may cause click interception issues (inherited from previous phases)

passed_tests: Mobile Portfolios page shows search input (placeholder: 'Поиск портфелей...')
Mobile Portfolios page shows filter button (SlidersHorizontal icon)
Mobile Portfolios page shows filter pills when filter button clicked (Все, Консервативный, Умеренный, Агрессивный)
Mobile Portfolios page shows portfolio cards with banners
Mobile Portfolios page shows risk badges on cards (green/amber/red based on risk level)
Mobile Portfolios page shows annual return (Годовая доходность) and monthly return (За месяц)
Mobile Portfolios page shows invest button (Инвестировать) and details button (Подробнее)
Mobile Portfolio Detail page shows hero section with banner image
Mobile Portfolio Detail page shows tabs (Обзор, Калькулятор, Активы)
Mobile Portfolio Detail page shows investment terms selector (6 мес. • 10%, 12 мес. • 12%)
Mobile Portfolio Detail page calculator shows expected profit (+$500.00 for $10,000 at 10% for 6 months)
Mobile Portfolio Detail page calculator updates correctly when amount changed ($5,000 profit for $100,000)
Mobile Portfolio Detail page has fixed bottom CTA button (Инвестировать)
Mobile Portfolio Detail page Assets tab shows 'Данные об активах недоступны' when no asset data
Desktop Portfolios page renders correctly on large screens (>768px)
Desktop Portfolios page shows portfolio cards with banners, risk badges, returns
Desktop Portfolio Detail page renders correctly with hero section and calculator
Desktop Portfolio Detail page shows tabs (Обзор, Активы, Доходность)
Desktop Portfolio Detail page shows invest buttons (hero and bottom)
Responsive layout switches between mobile (<768px) and desktop (>=768px) correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA Phase 5 implementation verified. MobilePortfolios.js and MobilePortfolioDetail.js components working correctly. Search filters portfolios by name/description. Filter pills filter by risk level (low/medium/high). Calculator tab calculates expected profit based on amount and duration. Fixed bottom CTA button positioned at bottom-16 with safe-area-inset-bottom padding. useIsMobile() hook controls mobile/desktop rendering at 768px breakpoint. Use ':visible' selector or JavaScript click for tab interactions due to duplicate DOM elements. Mobile viewport tested at 390x844, desktop at 1920x1080.

features: Annual return and monthly return display
Risk badge and portfolio name overlay
Calculator with amount input and duration selector
Invested amount and total return display
Fixed bottom CTA button with safe-area padding
Assets tab with pie chart (when data available)
